title: Observability: OTel GenAI Spans and Prometheus Metrics

questions.question: Before reading the lesson: what is the practical benefit of writing your harness's spans in the OTel GenAI attribute shape?
options: OTel spans compress better on disk.
Every OTel-compatible backend can read them without a custom parser.
OTel is a Python-only standard, so the harness gets type hints.
It is required by HIPAA.
questions.explanation: The conventions are a contract with the wider ecosystem. Honeycomb, Grafana Tempo, Jaeger, and Datadog all parse gen_ai.* attributes out of the box.
questions.question_zh: 在阅读课程之前: 用 OTel GenAI 属性形态写 harness 的 span,实用上的好处是什么?
options_zh: OTel span 在磁盘上压缩得更好。
任何兼容 OTel 的后端都能解析它们,不需要自定义 parser。
OTel 是只支持 Python 的标准,所以 harness 能拿到类型提示。
HIPAA 要求。
questions.explanation_zh: 这套约定是与广义生态的契约。Honeycomb、Grafana Tempo、Jaeger 和 Datadog 都能开箱即用地解析 gen_ai.* 属性。

questions.question: An exception is raised inside a SpanBuilder.span() context. What does the lesson's builder record?
options: The span is dropped to avoid polluting the trace.
status=ERROR, status_message includes the exception type and message, and an 'exception' event is appended.
status remains UNSET and the exception is silently swallowed.
The span is renamed to 'error'.
questions.explanation: Status ERROR plus an exception event matches the OTel spec. The exception is re-raised so caller code can react.
questions.question_zh: 在 SpanBuilder.span() 上下文中抛出异常时,本节的 builder 会记录什么?
options_zh: Span 被丢弃以避免污染 trace。
status=ERROR,status_message 包含异常类型和消息,并追加一个 'exception' event。
status 仍为 UNSET,异常被静默吞掉。
Span 被改名为 'error'。
questions.explanation_zh: ERROR 状态加 exception event 与 OTel 规范一致。异常会被重新抛出,让调用方代码可以反应。

questions.question: The Prometheus exposition for a histogram includes _bucket, _sum, and _count lines. Why are bucket counts cumulative (each le bucket includes all smaller buckets)?
options: Cumulative counts let the scraper compute per-bucket counts via subtraction without storing all observations.
Cumulative counts are the only format Grafana supports.
They are not cumulative; the lesson's exposition is non-standard.
Cumulative counts reduce floating-point error.
questions.explanation: Prometheus' design choice: a backend reads cumulative counts and computes per-bucket differences. This lets the time series be a simple monotonic counter per bucket.
questions.question_zh: Prometheus 给 histogram 暴露 _bucket、_sum、_count 行。为什么 bucket 计数是累计的 (每个 le bucket 包含所有更小的 bucket)?
options_zh: 累计计数让 scraper 通过相减就能算出每个 bucket 的计数,不必存所有观测值。
Grafana 只支持累计计数。
并不是累计的; 本节的暴露格式是非标准的。
累计计数能减少浮点误差。
questions.explanation_zh: Prometheus 的设计选择: 后端读取累计计数,通过差分得到每个 bucket。这让每个 bucket 的时间序列就是一个单调递增计数器。

questions.question: The harness wraps a tool execution in a span. Which attribute keys identify it as a tool call under the GenAI conventions?
options: gen_ai.system + gen_ai.request.model.
gen_ai.tool.name + gen_ai.tool.call.id.
agent.harness.tool + agent.harness.call.
operation + tool.name.
questions.explanation: gen_ai.tool.name and gen_ai.tool.call.id are the canonical keys for tool executions in the GenAI conventions.
questions.question_zh: harness 把工具执行包成一个 span。在 GenAI 约定下,哪些属性 key 表明这是工具调用?
options_zh: gen_ai.system + gen_ai.request.model。
gen_ai.tool.name + gen_ai.tool.call.id。
agent.harness.tool + agent.harness.call。
operation + tool.name。
questions.explanation_zh: gen_ai.tool.name 和 gen_ai.tool.call.id 是 GenAI 约定中工具执行的规范键。

questions.question: You want to query 'what is the p95 latency of read_file calls'. Which artifact do you query?
options: Each span's duration_ms in traces.jsonl, parsed by a script.
The Prometheus histogram tool_latency_ms{tool="read_file"} scraped over a window.
The counter tools_called_total, divided by the time window.
The status_message field of the span.
questions.explanation: Histograms are the right tool for percentiles. The counter only counts; the trace contains raw spans but is not pre-aggregated.
questions.question_zh: 你想查询「read_file 调用的 p95 延迟是多少」。该查询哪份 artifact?
options_zh: traces.jsonl 中每个 span 的 duration_ms,用脚本解析。
在一个时间窗口上 scrape 的 Prometheus histogram tool_latency_ms{tool="read_file"}。
用计数器 tools_called_total 除以时间窗口。
span 的 status_message 字段。
questions.explanation_zh: Histogram 是计算分位数的合适工具。计数器只数次数; trace 包含原始 span 但未做预聚合。

questions.question: A reviewer asks why the lesson hand-rolls instead of importing opentelemetry-sdk. Which answer is correct?
options: The SDK does not support GenAI conventions.
Hand-rolling teaches the wire format; the SDK can drop in later with the same attribute keys.
Hand-rolling is faster at runtime.
The SDK requires a network connection at import time.
questions.explanation: The conventions are stable across implementations. The hand-rolled version exists for clarity; production wires in the SDK and reuses the same gen_ai.* keys.
questions.question_zh: 评审者问为什么本节手写而不是引入 opentelemetry-sdk。哪个回答正确?
options_zh: SDK 不支持 GenAI 约定。
手写让你了解线协议; 之后再换上 SDK,沿用同一套属性键。
手写在运行时更快。
SDK 在 import 时需要网络连接。
questions.explanation_zh: 约定在不同实现间是稳定的。手写版本是为了表达清晰; 生产里接入 SDK,复用同一套 gen_ai.* 键。
